variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30253 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 16.9400VH3XLS000P
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30253 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Eppensteiner 16.9400VH3XLS000P. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30253
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200

variants.title: Filtrec D622G03 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Eppensteiner 169400VH3XLS000P
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D622G03. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D622G03 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 3µ @ β200
